assessment.roster_rule: live mode uses current roster/stat/injury APIs only

away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Shakira Austin
players.injury_comment: Austin is missing her first contest of the year Wednesday due to knee soreness. The star center's next chance to play comes Friday against New York. Lauren Betts figures to be thrust into a big role at center Wednesday.

players.name: Kiki Iriafen
players.injury_comment: This will be Iriafen's third straight game on the inactive list, and for now, she should be considered questionable for Friday's game in New York. Michaela Onyenwere, Angela Dugalic and Cotie McMahon will all help pick up the slack in Iriafen's absence.

players.name: Darianna Littlepage-Buggs
players.injury_comment: The rookie forward is still waiting to make her WNBA debut Wednesday. She remains eligible to make 12 regular-season appearances under a developmental deal.

injuries.name: Darianna Littlepage-Buggs
injuries.comment: The rookie forward is still waiting to make her WNBA debut Wednesday. She remains eligible to make 12 regular-season appearances under a developmental deal.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Ashlon Jackson
players.injury_comment: The Sun are preserving Jackson's eligibility under a development contract. Her next chance to play comes Friday versus Toronto.

players.name: Hailey Van Lith
players.injury_comment: Van Lith continues to contend with a left ankle contusion for a third consecutive contest. Her next chance to play comes Friday, when the Sun host the Tempo.
